title: Nested If Statements 🐢
description: Put decisions inside of decisions for complex logic.

slides.title: Inception: Code Within Code 🌀
Nested Ifs in Action 💻
slides.content: Try changing the variables to explore the different paths of this nested logic:

quizData.question: What is required for the inner 'if' statement to be checked?

options.text: They are checked at the same time

quizData.explanation: Code runs step-by-step. The inner 'if' is inside the block of the outer 'if'. If the outer condition is false, the entire block (including the inner 'if') is completely skipped!

slides.title: The Pyramid of Doom 🔺
